title: Common-cup air-dry + saturated calibration anchors
rig: 4x UMLIFE_v2_TLC555 capacitive probes, ESP32 plants_esp32_f4e9d4 fw 0.7.0, GPIO 34/35/36/39, one shared cup

notes.hypothesis: With all 4 probes in one medium at one moisture, the only variable is probe+ADC pin; air and water bracket the sensor's full raw-ADC range and fix the Saturated floor and air-dry ceiling.
notes.method: 4 probes co-located: open air on a paper towel (2 chunks, 5h downtime between) then fully submerged in one shared cup of water from ~23:21 to now. Monitor logs at 30s; segmented by raw value + time gap; 90s handling transients trimmed.
notes.findings: Air-dry center 3170 (pins 3151-3191); saturated center 978 (pins 926-1020); dynamic range ~2192. Pin spread is state-dependent: ~94 in water vs ~40 in air, and the pin ordering flips between states. Both air chunks agree within ~5 counts. The afternoon skylight bump is ESP32 self-heating (no soil/plant present), not moisture.
notes.conclusion: Placeholder Saturated (900-1050) and Parched (3050-3400) bands correctly bracket reality; this fixes the two endpoints (saturated ~978, air-dry ~3169) and the one robust wet|dry divide ~2096. Interior boundaries (moist/ideal/drying/dry) still require a controlled dry-down. Per-pin offset is NOT a single constant - it is state-dependent.

s2.history: reverse-polarity recovered; historically read above the pack in soil (+90)
s2.clean_finding: lowest in both same-medium states: air -26, water -69 (wet-biased)
s2.interpretation: soil +90 was microsite-confounded (4 different pot spots); common-cup is the first microsite-free look. Bias is non-constant (larger at wet end) -> needs two-point/gain+offset correction, not a single per-pin constant.
s2.health: OK quality, low noise (std ~6), flat in cup - functional
s2.caveat: no same-medium reading predates this run -> microsite-confound-lifting vs real-drift not separable yet

provenance.segmentation: raw value + time-gap state detection over monitor logs/

authority: PROPOSED - calibration evidence for the Data<->Firmware A2 reconciliation (ADR-0006 §5-6). Not authoritative; Firmware ratifies.
